source: RFP Section 30 / Table 64 (the capability scheme whose codes actually tag the 397 requirements).
scoring_method: Each capability scored 1-5, derived from the requirement-level responses tagged with its code, emphasizing OOB/CONFIG coverage of Must and Should items; then weighted and aggregated.
value_signal: KPI gap analysis shows only 5 of 66 KPIs are deliverable today; the biggest measurable value concentrates in W2C (billing velocity / ~$6.8M revenue leakage), TPA (offline mobile + field data capture), and PJE (project WIP/ASC 606).

capabilities.name: Work-to-Cash Velocity
capabilities.what_matters: Gated WO completion -> billing -> cash; close the 15-30 day billing lag; NTE alerts at 50/75/90%; eliminate revenue leakage; zero-touch auto-bill; GL-coding accuracy.
capabilities.value: Single largest operational improvement opportunity; ~$6.8M portfolio revenue-leakage exposure.

capabilities.name: Technician Productivity & Adoption
capabilities.what_matters: Native offline mobile (iOS 16+/Android 12+, not PWA); fast job close-out; auto-capture (OCR data plates); guided/gated workflows that reduce the chance to pick the wrong job.
capabilities.value: Precondition for all other value; lack of offline is the #1 technician complaint.

capabilities.name: Project Execution & Financial Control
capabilities.what_matters: WBS, WIP, ASC 606 percentage-of-completion, AIA G702/G703 progress billing, retainage, change orders, certified/prevailing wage, per-job rate overrides.
capabilities.value: Protects >$1B in project revenue and margin.

capabilities.name: Acquisition Onboarding Speed
capabilities.what_matters: Repeatable 6-8 week OpCo onboarding playbook; rapid data migration; configurable overlays for newly acquired entities.
capabilities.value: 5-7 acquisitions/year; onboarding speed compounds across the portfolio.

capabilities.name: Enterprise Visibility & Governance
capabilities.what_matters: Cross-OpCo standardized KPIs and benchmarking; 3-click drill-down; global-vs-entity governance; open data access for customer-built analytics/AI.
capabilities.value: No standardized KPIs today; wide OpCo variance (e.g., DSO, first-call resolution).

capabilities.name: Regulatory & Labor Compliance
capabilities.what_matters: Multi-tier CBA wage determination, certified payroll, Davis-Bacon/prevailing wage, blended crews, absolute union/non-union entity isolation, SOX ITGC, SoD, immutable audit, IPO/SEC readiness.
capabilities.value: Hard disqualification risk despite moderate weight; PE/IPO posture is non-negotiable.

capabilities.name: Customer Experience & Retention
capabilities.what_matters: Authorized-caller validation, equipment/asset history, customer comms (e.g., 'tech is 10 minutes away'), national-accounts consolidation.

capabilities.name: Scalable Platform Architecture
capabilities.what_matters: Single-tenant; 40+ -> 80+ entities without re-architecture; 2,000+ concurrent; 99.9% uptime; RPO<1h/RTO<4h; US (and Canada) residency; open API/event integration.
capabilities.value: Architectural gate for the whole portfolio.
